nasb.text: He made the hall of the throne where he was to judge, the hall of judgment, and it was paneled with cedar from floor to floor.

esv.text: And he made the Hall of the Throne where he was to pronounce judgment, even the Hall of Judgment. It was finished with cedar from floor to rafters.

cnv.text: 又建造王室座廊，就是審判廊，他在這裡執行審判。由地板到天花板，都貼上香柏木板。

ccb.text: 此外，他又建造了一个判案的公堂。堂内从地板到天花板都铺上了香柏木。
